Confined Space.checkpoint_text: Confined Space Entry Permit approved by authorized person
Atmosphere tested: Oxygen 19.5%-23.5%, LEL <10%, Toxics within limits
Gas detector calibrated & continuous monitoring arranged
Ventilation provided and space purged/cleaned as required
Entrants, attendant, and supervisor are trained & authorized
Attendant (standby man) deployed at entry point with no other duties

Electrical Work.checkpoint_text: Isolation from all sources of energy has been verified
Authorized persons are aware of isolation details

Critical Lifting.checkpoint_text: Approved critical lift plan is available and reviewed
All lifting equipment (crane, slings, shackles) are certified and valid
Load weight is verified and within crane capacity
Crane is positioned on stable and leveled ground with outriggers fully extended
Weather conditions (wind speed, visibility) are within safe limits
Competent and certified crane operator is assigned
Qualified signalman/rigger is assigned and communication method agreed
Exclusion zone is established and barricaded
Trial lift conducted to verify load balance and rigging
Lifting path is clear of obstructions and overhead hazards
Emergency plan and rescue procedures are in place

Excavation Work.checkpoint_text: Excavation permit approved by authorized personnel
Underground utilities (cables, pipelines) are identified and marked
Excavation area is barricaded and warning signs are installed
Proper shoring, sloping, or trench box provided to prevent collapse
Safe access and egress (ladder/ramp) provided for workers
Excavated material stored at safe distance from edge
Heavy equipment kept at safe distance from excavation edge

Scaffolding Work.checkpoint_text: Scaffold erected, modified, and dismantled by certified scaffolders
Scaffold design and load capacity approved
Foundation/base plates are stable and properly supported
Guardrails, mid-rails, and toe boards are installed
Scaffold is fully planked and platforms are secured
Scaffold inspected before use and after any modification
Workers using scaffold are trained and using fall protection
No overloading of scaffold beyond rated capacity
Scaffold is protected from weather conditions (wind, rain) if required

Hot Work.checkpoint_text: Validated that work area is clean of all combustibles
Dedicated Fire Watch with extinguisher is present
Work area has been gas-tested and barricaded
